zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonathan Sisson於大約1763年出生在美國紐約州時，他的父親James Sisson36歲，母親Elizabeth Howland23歲。他和Hulda Herrick至少有3個兒子和8個女兒。他去世於大約1848年12月22日在加拿大新布隆士威省約克道格拉斯享年86歲，埋葬在加拿大新布隆士威省約克道格拉斯波次 可納 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Sisson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English female personal name Sis(se), Cisse, a pet form of Cecily (see Sisley ) + -son.
variant of Syson, a habitational name from Syston (Leicestershire), from a short form of an Old English personal name such as Sigehǣth or Sigefrith + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Sissons
meanings: variant of Sisson , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Sisley
meanings: English (Kent): from the popular Middle English female personal name Sisely (Old French Cecile, Cicile, from Latin Caecilia, feminine form of the Roman surname Caecilius, a derivative of caecus ‘blind’). This was the name of a early Christian virgin martyr of the 2nd or 3rd century, who came to be regarded as the patron saint of music. The surname is generally spelt with C- in the Middle Ages, following the trend of the personal name, and with S- in modern times. Compare Cecil and see also Sise , Sisson .

nameMeanings.name: Jonathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathan
meanings: Respelling of   Jonathan  , as if a combination of   John   and   Nathan .

variants.name: Jonathon
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Jonathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathon
meanings: Mainly U.S.: respelled form of   Jonathan  , influenced by   John .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Albany is Named Capital of New York
historicEvents.description: Albany became the capital of New York in 1797. Albany is the oldest continuous settlement of the original 13 colonies.
Oldest Grave seen in Memorials list

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.

historicEvents.title: The Oregon Trail
historicEvents.description: Many people started their 2,170-mile West trek to settle the land found by Louis and Clark. They used large-wheeled wagons to pack most of their belongings and were guided by trails that were made by the previous trappers and traders who walked the area. Over time the trail needed annual improvements to make the trip faster and safer. Most of Interstate 80 and 84 cover most of the ground that was the original trail.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonathan Sisson was born about 1763, in New York, United States, his father, James Sisson, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Howland, was 23. He had at least 3 sons and 8 daughters with Hulda Herrick. He died about 22 December 1848, in Douglas, York, New Brunswick, Canada, at the age of 86, and was buried in Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, New Brunswick, Canada.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonathan Sisson est né environ 1763, à New York, États-Unis, son père, James Sisson, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Howland, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles avec Hulda Herrick. Il est décédé environ 22 décembre 1848, à Douglas, York, Nouveau-Brunswick, Canada, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, Nouveau-Brunswick, Canada.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jonathan Sisson um 1763 in New York, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Sisson 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Howland 23. Er hatte mit Hulda Herrick mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb um 22. Dezember 1848 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Douglas, York, New Brunswick, Kanada und wurde in Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, New Brunswick, Kanada begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Sisson è nato il circa 1763 nel New York, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, James Sisson, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Howland, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie con Hulda Herrick. Morì circa 22 dicembre 1848, nel Douglas, York, Nuovo Brunswick, Canada, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, Nuovo Brunswick, Canada.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonathan Sissonが約1763年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州で生まれた時，父James Sissonは36歳，母Elizabeth Howlandは23歳であった。彼はHulda Herrickとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1848年12月22日にカナダニューブランズウィック州ヨークドウグラスで86歳で死去し，カナダニューブランズウィック州ヨークドウグラスブルッツ コルナー セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonathan Sisson(이)가 대략 1763년 미국 뉴욕 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Sisson(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Howland(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Hulda Herrick(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1848년 12월 22일 캐나다 뉴브런즈윅 요르크 더글라스에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 캐나다 뉴브런즈윅 요르크 더글라스 버츠 코른어 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Sisson nasceu aproximadamente 1763, em Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, James Sisson, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Howland, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas com Hulda Herrick. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 22 de dezembro de 1848, em Douglas, York, Novo Brunswick, Canadá, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, Novo Brunswick, Canadá.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonathan Sisson родился около 1763 г. в местности Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени James Sisson было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Howland, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей от Hulda Herrick. Он умер около 22 декабря 1848 г. в местности доуглас, ерк, Нью-Брансуик, Канада в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности буртц корнир кеметири, доуглас, ерк, Нью-Брансуик, Канада.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonathan Sisson nació aproximadamente 1763, en Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, James Sisson, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Howland, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas con Hulda Herrick. Murió aproximadamente 22 de diciembre de 1848, en Douglas, York, Nuevo Brunswick, Canadá, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Burtts Corner Cemetery, Douglas, York, Nuevo Brunswick, Canadá.
